decisions.resolution: Harness-only mission — tests enforcement, not new product features
BPB produces BLUEPRINT.json only in phase 1; CDR implements after SENTRY BP audit
Probe IDs locked to REGRESSION_PROBE_CATALOG.json — no renames without founder receipt
Consolidate behavior.mjs + snt-live-verify.mjs into one harness; keep old scripts as thin wrappers during transition
Separate mission FACTORY-DELIBERATION-SENTRY-REPAIR-0001 only after harness trusted and fails on intentional negative control

non_goals_locked: Production mutation without cleanup confirm flag
